name: trust_score_query
description: Research any crypto project by name or address. Returns trust score (0-100), risk level (Low/Medium/High), community review count, average rating, strengths, and concerns. Accepts project name (e.g. 'AIXBT', 'Uniswap') or contract address. Powered by Maiat community reviews and on-chain baseline analysis. For automated x402 agent payments, use trust_gate instead.
